microsoft_ft: Embedded with **enterprise customers** (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp) to deploy Azure resilience drills end-to-end, translating each customer's unique operational constraints into custom validation workflows that drove **$14M+ business impact**.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing deployment capacity by 21% — field learnings fed directly into platform roadmap priorities.

Implemented automated **CI/CD pipelines** in partnership with IT, Operations, and Engineering, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual handoffs across specialized infrastructure.

Prioritized and resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** via Agile sprint planning, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking downstream deployment workflows in a fast-paced, constraint-heavy environment.
